name: Omon.grazSouth30
title: Total Grazing of Phytoplankton by Zooplankton
description: Total grazing of phytoplankton by zooplankton defined as tendency of moles of carbon per cubic metre.
processing note: This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of Omon.grazSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
